calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-08-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-18-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Federated Financial Corporation of America as Assignee of MBNA America (delaware), N.A.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering of the declartion, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Hossein Vossoogh as follows:
Damages $24,431.80
Prejudgment Interest $18,477.34
Costs $385.00, for a total of $43,294.14
Judgment signed in open court.
